1.gl: properly, to eye or (generally) to heed, i.e. pay attention; by implication, to respond; by extension to begin to speak; specifically to sing, shout, testify, announce

1.gl: to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications)
1.kj: bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(-ation), pronounce, publish, re
1.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met);

1.gl: elevation, i.e. the act (literally, a journey to a higher place, figuratively, a thought arising), or (concretely) the condition (literally, a step or grademark, figuratively, a superiority of station); specifically a cl
1.kj: things that come up, (high) degree, deal, go up, stair, step, story.

1.gl: tightness (i.e. figuratively, trouble); transitively, a female rival:
1.kj: adversary, adversity, affliction, anguish, distress, tribulation, trouble.

1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
1.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
2.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

2.gl: the lip (as a natural boundary); by implication, language; by analogy, a margin (of a vessel, water, cloth, etc.)
2.kj: band, bank, binding, border, brim, brink, edge, language, lip, prating, (sea-)shore, side, speech, talk, (vain) words.
2.dv: or (in dual and plural) שֶׂפֶת; probably from H5595 (סָפָה) or H8192 (שָׁפָה) through the idea of termination (compare H5490 (סוֹף));

2.gl: the tongue (of man or animals), used literally (as the instrument of licking, eating, or speech), and figuratively (speech, an ingot, a fork of flame, a cove of water)
2.kj: [phrase] babbler, bay, [phrase] evil speaker, language, talker, tongue, wedge.
2.dv: or לָשֹׁן; also (in plural) feminine לְשֹׁנָה; from H3960 (לָשַׁן);

2.gl: to snatch away, whether in a good or a bad sense
2.kj: [idiom] at all, defend, deliver (self), escape, [idiom] without fail, part, pluck, preserve, recover, rescue, rid, save, spoil, strip, [idiom] surely, take (out).

2.gl: an untruth; by implication, a sham (often adverbial)
2.kj: without a cause, deceit(-ful), false(-hood, -ly), feignedly, liar, [phrase] lie, lying, vain (thing), wrongfully.

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

3.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)

3.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

3.kj: deceit(-ful, -fully), false, guile, idle, slack, slothful.

4.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
4.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

4.gl: properly, a piercer, i.e. an arrow; by implication, a wound; figuratively, (of God) thunderbolt; the shaft of aspear
4.kj: [phrase] archer, arrow, dart, shaft, staff, wound.
4.dv: from H2686 (חָצַץ); also by interchange for H6086 (עֵץ)

4.kj: champion, chief, [idiom] excel, giant, man, mighty (man, one), strong (man), valiant man.
4.dv: or גִּבֹּר; (shortened) intensive from the same as H1397 (גֶּבֶר);

4.gl: to point (transitive or intransitive); intensively, to pierce; figuratively, to inculcate

4.dv: or (feminine) גַּחֶלֶת; from an unused root meaning to glow or kindle;

4.gl: the Spanish broom (from its pole-like stems)

5.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)

5.gl: properly, to turn aside from the road (for a lodging or any other purpose), i.e. sojourn (as a guest); also to shrink, fear (as in a strange place); also to gather forhostility (as afraid)
5.kj: abide, assemble, be afraid, dwell, fear, gather (together), inhabitant, remain, sojourn, stand in awe, (be) stranger, [idiom] surely.

5.gl: to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively)
5.kj: abide, continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-er), have habitation, inhabit, lay, place, (cause to) remain, rest, set (up).
5.dv: a primitive root (apparently akin (by transmission) to H7901 (שָׁכַב) through the idea of lodging; compare H5531 (סִכְלוּת), H7925 (שָׁכַם));

5.gl: Kedar, a son of Ishmael; also (collectively) Bedouin (as his descendants or representatives)

5.gl: Meshek, a son of Japheth, and the people descended from him
5.dv: the same in form as H4901 (מֶשֶׁךְ), but probably of foreign derivation;

5.gl: a tent (as clearly conspicuous from a distance)
